name: netboot.xyz
longDescription:
netboot.xyz is a network-based bootable operating system installer built on iPXE. Boot your favourite OS installers, live CDs, utilities, and rescue tools directly over the network — no USB sticks required.

The included web UI lets you manage local assets, custom menus, and endpoints. Note that this container only serves the boot files and web configuration; actual PXE booting requires a DHCP server on your network configured with the right next-server and boot-file name.
description: Network-bootable OS installers and live CDs via iPXE, with a web config UI.
